name: Lumika Demo Toyota Dealer Agent
description: AAP-compliant Auto Agent Protocol dealer agent for Demo Toyota in San Francisco. Exposes inventory search, vehicle detail, dealer profile, and consented lead-submission skills to buyer agents (LLMs and CRMs) over A2A.

extensions.description: Auto Agent Protocol A2A Automotive Retail Profile v0.1

skills.name: Dealer Information
skills.description: Return Demo Toyota's dealership profile: legal/trade name, address, brands carried, business hours, contact channels, and supported services (financing, trade-in, delivery).
examples: What time does Demo Toyota open on Saturday?
Show me Demo Toyota's brands, address, and phone numbers.

skills.name: Inventory Facets
skills.description: Return aggregated facets (makes, models, years, conditions, body styles, price/mileage ranges) over Demo Toyota's inventory. Useful for narrowing down a search before calling inventory.search.
examples: How many used vehicles do you have by make?
What price and mileage ranges cover your certified pre-owned SUVs?

skills.name: Inventory Search
skills.description: Search Demo Toyota's vehicle inventory by make, model, trim, year, condition, price, mileage, body style, fuel, drivetrain, VIN, stock number, or free-text query. Supports pagination and sort.
examples: Find used Honda CR-Vs under $35,000 from 2023 or newer.
Show certified pre-owned RAV4 Hybrids with under 30,000 miles.

skills.name: Vehicle Detail
skills.description: Return full detail for a specific vehicle by VIN, stock number, or vehicle_id, including FTC-compliant pricing fields (msrp, list_price, offered_price, price), photos, equipment, history, warranty, and dealer page URL.
examples: What's included on stock #DT-2451 with delivery to ZIP 94107?

skills.name: General Dealership Lead
skills.description: Submit a consented general dealership inquiry (financing question, trade-in interest, service question, callback request). Customer contact info requires a ConsentGrant with scope 'general_inquiry'.
examples: Submit a financing question on behalf of the user.
Ask Demo Toyota to call the user back about trade-in valuations.

skills.name: Vehicle Lead
skills.description: Submit a consented, ADF/CRM-compatible vehicle-specific lead for a particular VIN, stock number, or vehicle. Requires a ConsentGrant with scope 'vehicle_inquiry'.
examples: Send a buy lead for VIN 1HGCY2F57RA000001 with a trade-in.
Submit a cash-finance lead for stock #DT-2451.

skills.name: Appointment Lead
skills.description: Submit a consented appointment request (test drive, showroom visit, handover, phone call, video call, trade-in appraisal). Requires a ConsentGrant with scope 'appointment'.
examples: Book a test drive for VIN 1HGCY2F57RA000001 next Saturday morning.
Request a 30-minute video call with a Demo Toyota sales advisor.

http_security_scheme.description: Bearer JWT issued by Lumika AI for authorized buyer agents. Tokens MUST be sent in the 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' header on every request.
